title: tellima bolanderi
intro: Tellima bolanderi, also known as Bolander's tellima, is a perennial plant species in the saxifrage family. It is native to the western coast of North America and has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties. The plant contains saponins, which have been found to have anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, and it may help to soothe digestive issues and promote wound healing. Herbal preparations of Tellima bolanderi can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to support overall health and well-being.
